meaning: adv.[语]依照句法地,在语句构成上
examples: Some find this method is easier to follow syntactically.
Syntactically, this is equivalent to plot sin (x), cos (x).
One who never criticised, and yet might well have done, given her stature, was Amy Clampitt, that mistress of the artful line and the syntactically convoluted stanza.
